label: qwen36_35b_a3b_gguf_q4km_q4ks_direct_selected_moe_c1_4k128
git_commit_under_test: working-tree pre-commit: c=1 GGUF decode skips compact selected-MoE scheduler by default

hardware.note: local RX 7900 XTX/gfx1100 repeated-run diagnostic; W7900 not rerun

change.summary: For GGUF c=1 MoE decode, prefer the direct selected T16 GEMV path and do not enter the compact grouped selected-MoE scheduler unless HIPENGINE_GGUF_COMPACT_MOE_C1=1 is explicitly set.
change.rationale: At top_k=2 and rows=1, the direct selected path avoids the compact scheduler group-count/prefix/scatter setup while still using fused selected Q4_K gate/up+SiLU and selected Q4_K/Q5_K/Q6_K down GEMV kernels. The compact c=1 path remains available as an opt-in diagnostic via HIPENGINE_GGUF_COMPACT_MOE_C1=1.

correctness_and_dispatch_gate.coverage_note: Default c=1 route uses direct selected T16 allocations without compact scheduler; compact grouped scheduler test now opts in with HIPENGINE_GGUF_COMPACT_MOE_C1=1. Selected Q4/Q5/Q6 T16 fixtures validate kernel numerics. Benchmarks report finite final logits and stable final token IDs.

benchmark_command_common: HIPENGINE_GGUF_AOTRITON_PREFILL=v3 HIPENGINE_GGUF_ALLOW_UNSAFE_QWEN35MOE_FASTPATHS=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. uv run python scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model <model> --quant <gguf_q4_k_m|gguf_q4_k_s> --prompt-length 4096 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 1 --warmup-runs 1 --measured-runs 3 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --use-gemv-decode --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json <tmp-json>

comparison.note: PARO comparison is the prior local 2026-05-21 row, not rerun in this artifact.

decision: Retain direct selected-MoE c=1 decode as the default path. It improves both required columns over the router256 baseline: Q4_K_M +0.31% decode and Q4_K_S +0.50% decode, with unchanged tracked peak memory and deterministic finite logits.
